players.name: Jones
players.title: Associate Continuity Specialist

clipboard.desc: Clipboard with actual current task list. Only accurate document in AlgoCratic Futures™. +2 Compliant on written instructions.

smile_tm.desc: SMILE™ tablet. Restores 1 Sanity. Compliance Citrus flavor. The Algorithm notes your consumption rate.

players.mission: Seven departments have submitted conflicting facility requests for 09:00. CIO must reconcile them using the one truck. At least two are physically impossible. CIO is aware. The departments are not.
players.known_secret: Where everything physically is and where it's going. The furniture. The equipment. The people.

players.name: Smith
players.title: Senior Legacy Architect

pager.desc: Pager (active, number unknown). The Algorithm sends messages. You cannot reply.

smile_tm.desc: SMILE™ tablet. Restores 1 Sanity. Compliance Citrus flavor. The Algorithm notes your consumption rate.

players.mission: ECHO cascade errors detected in Sub-Level 2 Infrastructure Terminal. Payroll crashes at 09:00 if unresolved. ICD must reach the terminal via service stairwell.
players.known_secret: Which systems are actually failing and have been held together with workarounds for months.
